name: MoneyGram
description_short: San Jose MoneyGram serves the Empire St area with check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services daily from 7AM-11PM.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 412 E Empire St in San Jose, CA is a standalone check-cashing store open seven days a week from 7AM to 11PM. This San Jose location serves the East Side community with convenient access and extended hours that accommodate early morning and late evening financial transactions. Customers can find this branch easily on E Empire St with ample parking nearby for quick visits.

The San Jose MoneyGram at this address offers check cashing, domestic and international money transfers, bill payments, and money orders. Call +1 408-329-2778 to confirm services or ask questions before visiting the 412 E Empire St location. Staff handle all transactions with security protocols to protect customer information.

San Jose residents planning to use this MoneyGram location should bring a valid photo ID for check cashing and wire transfers. The 7AM opening time accommodates early morning travelers and commuters, while 11PM closing serves customers with evening availability needs. This standalone location makes accessing money transfer and check-cashing services convenient for San Jose area residents.
address: 412 E Empire St, San Jose, CA 95112

company_info.headquarters: 412 E Empire St, San Jose, CA 95112

pros: 39+ service locations across San Jose provide extensive geographic accessibility
Extended operating hours (many locations open until 8-11 PM) accommodate working schedules
Partnership locations include supermarkets and retail shops in underserved neighborhoods
Online and offline service options for money transfers and bill payments
Integration with major chains like CVS/Longs ensures familiar, recognizable locations
Serves non-English speaking communities through partner businesses like Mercado California and Artesanias Morelia
Searchable location finder with address, city, state, ZIP, and map-based discovery
cons: Money transfer services typically carry higher fees compared to bank wire transfers
No building credit or savings account functionality—purely transactional services
Dependent on partner locations' operating hours; no 24/7 service availability
Limited to money transfer and check cashing; no loan or credit products available
No online account management or account history features mentioned on the website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing check cashing without a bank account
Immigrants and international workers sending money to family outside the U.S.
Workers with irregular schedules needing evening/weekend money transfer access
Communities preferring culturally-aligned service locations over traditional banks
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers, immigrants sending remittances, and individuals needing quick check cashing or money transfers outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that this is a transaction-based service model with associated fees—it does not build credit, provide savings vehicles, or offer the relationship-based services of traditional banks.
services: Mobile and desktop access to services
meta_description: San Jose, CA MoneyGram at 412 E Empire St. Check cashing and money transfers open 7AM-11PM daily.
